calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-12-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-12-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Prove-Up Hearing.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lisa Sarto.
Paul Arshawsky, Esq., for Plaintiff: Ayman T. Shehadeh, also present.
No appearance by the Defendant: Sarah Walter.
09:35 am. - Plaintiff's witness, Ayman Shehadeh was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Lease agreement dtd. 9-4-03----------------ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Three day notice dtd. 4-9-04---------------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at:
324 Larkin St., #33, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Per Diem Damages of $4,433.09
Costs of $374.60
For the total of $4,807.69
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-28-2004 Continued To Jul-12-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Jason Stein, Clerk Kay Peek, not reported (206)

Appearances: Ayman Shehadeh with Paul Arshawski, Esquire; Sarah Walter, defendant in pro per

After settlement conference off the record, no settlement is reached.
Trial date is maintained.
